mapper.select: SELECT id, email, password, name, github_access_token, github_username, github_repo, created_at, updated_at FROM user WHERE email = #{email}
SELECT id, email, password, name, github_access_token, github_username, github_repo, created_at, updated_at FROM user WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user (email, password, name) VALUES (#{email}, #{password}, #{name})
